$comment: Drop this at the root of your repo as `qa.config.json`. The QA packet generator (e.g. Parity Studio) reads this to know what to capture. Conforms to the consumer-side slice of qa-packet-schema.json.
$comment_previewUrl: Generator substitutes {path} per state. For deployed previews, use https://feature-branch.vercel.app{path} or a per-PR Vercel preview URL.
$comment_baseline: Git ref to capture `before` screenshots from. Generator does git checkout, captures, then returns to current branch.

pet_sitter.label: Jaynee — pet sitter
pet_sitter.description: Returning user with 5 mock clients, mid-week morning routine.

new_user.label: Day-1 sitter
new_user.description: Fresh signup, no clients yet, just enabled push.

expectedChanges: Bella's card shows compact CareCard with red 'No human food' + 'NEVER alone' chips
Other client cards show standard summary (no red stripe)
Filter chips visible: All / Needs reply / New client / Confirmed
Calendar header reads 'Today, May 4, 2026' (or current date)
4-stat strip visible: bookings / M&G / blocks / hours free
Bella's appointment shows full Care Card with 'No human food' and 'Walk after every nap'
8 categorized care rules visible: Diet, Medical, Behavior, Schedule, Potty, Solo, Items, Comms
AI permissions section with 3 toggles (READ / DRAFT / SEND)
Fail-closed by default footer at the bottom
Express add panel pinned at top with FASTEST PATH badge
After pasting Mochi paragraph + clicking send arrow, form auto-fills
3 care rules in the rules editor

interactions.text: Mochi is a 5yo Shiba Inu. Owner James Kim (555) 555-1010. Apoquel 16mg with breakfast. NO other dogs. Shy at first — give 10 min to warm up.

remotion.$comment: Generator can render an end-to-end demo by stitching state captures + smooth-pan recordings. Disable if Remotion not installed in the consumer repo.

email.$comment: Generator picks up SMTP / Resend / Mailgun creds from its own env. Consumer just declares recipients.
